hub.title: Tickets
hub.description: The agency's production funnel, from idea to archive.

empty.title: No tickets here yet
empty.description: Create the first card and start moving work through the production funnel.

clearDialog.title: Archive done tickets?
clearDialog.description: All {{count}} ticket(s) in the "Done" column will be archived and leave the board. You can still see them in the list view by filtering for archived.

list.loadErrorDescription: We couldn't load the tickets. Try again.
list.emptyFiltered: Adjust the filters to see more results.
list.emptyDescription: Create the first ticket and start moving work through the funnel.

deleteConfirm.description: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. The tickets and all their content (subtasks, creatives, posts) will be removed.

newDialog.description: Start with the context. Creative type, channels and due date come later, in the Scoping stage.
newDialog.campaignEmpty: Create a campaign first to open tickets.
newDialog.briefPlaceholder: Describe the context, message and desired tone… (optional — you can build on it in Ideation)
